queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, sorter_model, facility_zone, throughput_rate, load_factor, CASE WHEN load_factor >= 80.0 THEN 'critical' WHEN load_factor >= 50.0 THEN 'elevated' WHEN load_factor >= 20.0 THEN 'normal' ELSE 'idle' END AS load_tier, CASE WHEN cell_temp >= 30.0 THEN 'hot' WHEN cell_temp >= 22.0 THEN 'warm' ELSE 'cool' END AS temp_category FROM "{stream}" WHERE (facility_zone IN ('ZONE-1', 'ZONE-2', 'ZONE-3') AND operation_mode != 'manual') OR (charge_remaining < 50.0 AND scan_attempts >= 2) ORDER BY _timestamp DESC, load_factor DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT DISTINCT sorter_model, operation_mode, facility_zone, build_signature FROM "{stream}" WHERE defect_limit BETWEEN 1.0 AND 3.0 AND runtime_hours NOT IN (24, 48, 72) AND package_size >= 300 ORDER BY sorter_model ASC, operation_mode ASC

SELECT _timestamp, log, control_center, operation_mode, cell_temp, CASE WHEN cell_temp >= 35.0 AND operation_mode = 'auto' THEN 'OVERTEMP-AUTO' WHEN cell_temp >= 35.0 THEN 'OVERTEMP' WHEN cell_temp >= 28.0 AND charge_remaining < 30.0 THEN 'WARNING-LOWCHARGE' WHEN cell_temp >= 28.0 THEN 'WARM' ELSE 'NORMAL' END AS alert_status FROM "{stream}" WHERE (cell_temp >= 28.0) OR (charge_remaining < 30.0 AND operation_mode != 'hybrid') ORDER BY cell_temp DESC, charge_remaining ASC LIMIT 20

results: Q027 warehouse event record 3 ACK batch batchIdList:Q027-3
Q028 warehouse event record 0 ACK batch batchIdList:Q028-0
Q026 warehouse event record 0 ACK batch batchIdList:Q026-0

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, sorter_model, facility_zone, throughput_rate, load_factor, charge_remaining, ROUND(CAST(throughput_rate AS FLOAT) * (CAST(load_factor AS FLOAT) / 100.0) * (CAST(charge_remaining AS FLOAT) / 100.0), 2) AS effective_capacity FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate > 300.0 AND load_factor >= 30.0 AND facility_zone != 'ZONE-4' ORDER BY effective_capacity DESC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT pallet_id, sorter_model, conveyor_lane, operation_mode, runtime_hours, ROUND(runtime_hours / 24.0, 1) AS runtime_days, CASE WHEN runtime_hours >= 500 THEN 'heavy' WHEN runtime_hours >= 168 THEN 'moderate' ELSE 'light' END AS usage_class FROM "{stream}" WHERE runtime_hours IS NOT NULL AND (sorter_model LIKE 'SORT-X%' OR sorter_model LIKE 'SORT-Z%' OR (sorter_model = 'SORT-Q5' AND runtime_hours < 200)) ORDER BY runtime_days DESC

SELECT _timestamp, control_center, facility_zone, cell_temp, COALESCE(CAST(conveyor_segment AS VARCHAR), 'N/A') AS segment_label, COALESCE(CAST(defect_limit AS VARCHAR), '0.0') AS defect_str FROM "{stream}" WHERE facility_zone IN (SELECT DISTINCT facility_zone FROM "{stream}" WHERE cell_temp > 25.0) ORDER BY cell_temp DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT _timestamp, build_signature, operation_mode, item_count, package_size, ROUND(CAST(item_count AS FLOAT) * CAST(package_size AS FLOAT) / 1000.0, 2) AS total_weight_kg, CASE WHEN item_count * package_size >= 300000 THEN 'XL' WHEN item_count * package_size >= 100000 THEN 'LG' WHEN item_count * package_size >= 30000 THEN 'MD' ELSE 'SM' END AS shipment_tier FROM "{stream}" WHERE item_count > 0 AND package_size > 0 ORDER BY total_weight_kg DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, sorter_model, scan_attempts, retry_flag, CASE WHEN scan_attempts >= 3 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS retry_flag_derived FROM (SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, sorter_model, scan_attempts, scan_attempts >= 3 AS retry_flag FROM "{stream}") sub WHERE retry_flag = TRUE ORDER BY scan_attempts DESC

SELECT _timestamp, conveyor_lane, facility_zone, cell_temp, ambient_deviation FROM (SELECT _timestamp, conveyor_lane, facility_zone, cell_temp, ROUND(cell_temp - (SELECT AVG(cell_temp) FROM "{stream}" t2 WHERE t2.facility_zone = t1.facility_zone), 2) AS ambient_deviation FROM "{stream}" t1 WHERE cell_temp IS NOT NULL) derived WHERE ABS(ambient_deviation) > 3.0 ORDER BY ABS(ambient_deviation) DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT _timestamp, operation_mode, conveyor_lane, load_factor, charge_remaining, ROUND((load_factor + (100.0 - charge_remaining)) / 2.0, 2) AS stress_index, CASE WHEN load_factor > 70.0 AND charge_remaining < 30.0 THEN 'OVERLOADED' WHEN load_factor > 70.0 THEN 'HIGH_LOAD' WHEN charge_remaining < 30.0 THEN 'LOW_CHARGE' ELSE 'STABLE' END AS health_status FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY stress_index DESC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 15

SELECT DISTINCT ON (facility_zone) facility_zone, _timestamp, sorter_model, throughput_rate, load_factor FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate IS NOT NULL ORDER BY facility_zone ASC, throughput_rate DESC
SELECT _timestamp, log, facility_zone, stream FROM "{stream}" WHERE stream = 'stdout' ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 15

queries.sql: SELECT risk_rules_list, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" WHERE risk_rules_list IS NOT NULL   AND TRIM(CAST(risk_rules_list AS VARCHAR)) <> ''   AND page_slug = 'itemPage' GROUP BY risk_rules_list ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, log, facility_zone, operation_mode,
  throughput_rate, load_factor, charge_remaining, cell_temp,
  item_count, defect_limit, package_size
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE (facility_zone = 'ZONE-1' OR facility_zone = 'ZONE-2')
  AND (operation_mode IN ('auto', 'manual') OR (operation_mode = 'hybrid' AND load_factor > 50.0))
  AND throughput_rate > 100.0
  AND charge_remaining IS NOT NULL
  AND ((cell_temp >= 20.0 AND cell_temp <= 35.0) OR operation_mode = 'manual')
  AND defect_limit < 3.0
ORDER BY _timestamp DESC, throughput_rate DESC
LIMIT 15

queries.sql:
SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, load_factor, throughput_rate,
  CASE
    WHEN load_factor >= 80.0 AND cell_temp >= 30.0 THEN 'CRITICAL'
    WHEN load_factor >= 50.0 AND cell_temp >= 25.0 THEN 'WARNING'
    WHEN load_factor >= 20.0 THEN 'NORMAL'
    WHEN charge_remaining < 20.0 THEN 'LOW_CHARGE'
    ELSE 'IDLE'
  END AS status_level,
  CASE
    WHEN throughput_rate >= 500.0 THEN 'HIGH'
    WHEN throughput_rate >= 200.0 THEN 'MEDIUM'
    ELSE 'LOW'
  END AS throughput_tier
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE facility_zone != 'ZONE-4'
ORDER BY load_factor DESC, _timestamp DESC
LIMIT 20

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, visitor_session_id, action_category, bot_flag, info_tag FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category NOT IN ('interaction', 'navigation') AND page_slug IN ('itemPage', 'cartPage') AND bot_flag IS NULL AND org_name = 'warehouse-east'

SELECT _timestamp, COALESCE(page_url, endpoint_path, resource_path, page_slug) AS resolved_page, action_category, latency_ms FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'interaction' ORDER BY latency_ms DESC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, CASE WHEN page_url IS NOT NULL THEN page_url WHEN endpoint_path IS NOT NULL THEN endpoint_path WHEN resource_path IS NOT NULL THEN resource_path ELSE CONCAT('fallback:', page_slug) END AS best_url, visitor_session_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category IN ('navigation', 'interaction') ORDER BY _timestamp DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT _timestamp, component_name, exception_message FROM "{stream}" WHERE (exception_message LIKE '%Exception%' OR exception_message LIKE '%Timeout%' OR exception_message LIKE '%Overflow%') AND component_name LIKE '%engine%' ORDER BY _timestamp ASC

SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, sorter_model, facility_zone, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE pallet_id IN ('PL-001', 'PL-003', 'PL-005', 'PL-007') AND sorter_model IN ('SORT-X1', 'SORT-M3', 'SORT-Q5') AND throughput_rate > 0 AND facility_zone IS NOT NULL ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC, pallet_id ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, (_timestamp / 1000000) AS ts_seconds, (_timestamp % 60000000) AS within_minute, action_category, page_slug FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category = 'performanceMetric' ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, alert_tags, auth_token, bin_code, action_category FROM "{stream}" WHERE alert_tags IN ('latency', 'error', 'capacity') AND bin_code LIKE 'BIN-%' AND action_category = 'performanceMetric' ORDER BY alert_tags ASC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT _timestamp, client_agent, geo_org, geo_country, action_category FROM "{stream}" WHERE geo_org IS NOT NULL ORDER BY geo_org ASC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, guard_mode, inp_micros, cls_score, device_type FROM "{stream}" WHERE guard_mode IN ('active', 'passive') AND inp_micros > 100000 AND cls_score > 0.05 AND device_type = 'Mobile' ORDER BY inp_micros DESC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, operation_name, payload_size, route_key, response_code FROM "{stream}" WHERE operation_name IS NOT NULL AND payload_size > 256 ORDER BY payload_size DESC, operation_name ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, query_source, render_scope, route_key, site_name FROM "{stream}" WHERE query_source IN ('dashboard', 'api', 'cli') AND render_scope IN ('SSR', 'CSR') AND site_name LIKE 'site-%' ORDER BY query_source ASC, site_name ASC, _timestamp DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT _timestamp, array_extract(regexp_match(client_agent, '([A-Za-z]+)/[0-9.]+'), 1) AS agent_family, action_category, page_slug FROM "{stream}" WHERE client_agent IS NOT NULL AND action_category = 'navigation' ORDER BY agent_family ASC, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, action_category, (CASE WHEN page_url IS NULL AND endpoint_path IS NULL THEN 'both_missing' WHEN page_url IS NULL THEN 'only_page_url_missing' WHEN endpoint_path IS NULL THEN 'only_endpoint_missing' ELSE 'both_present' END) AS url_status FROM "{stream}" WHERE action_category IN ('performanceMetric', 'interaction') ORDER BY url_status, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 15

SELECT _timestamp, COALESCE(bot_flag, info_tag, passthrough_flag, 'clean') AS security_tag, CAST(COALESCE(lcp_micros, inp_micros, latency_ms) AS FLOAT) AS perf_value, device_type, page_slug FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY perf_value DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT _timestamp, COALESCE(exception_message, log_message) AS msg, COALESCE(response_code, 0) AS status, latency_ms FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY latency_ms DESC LIMIT 10

results: NetworkException: connection to batch sync failed

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE pallet_id = 'NONEXISTENT' ORDER BY _timestamp
SELECT facility_zone, ROUND(SUM(throughput_rate) / NULLIF(COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE load_factor < 0), 0), 2) AS ratio FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY facility_zone
SELECT _timestamp, log FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 5 OFFSET 9999

SELECT _timestamp, COALESCE(upstream_error_code, 'N/A') AS ue, COALESCE(endpoint_path, 'N/A') AS ep, COALESCE(resource_path, 'N/A') AS rp FROM "{stream}" WHERE upstream_error_code IS NOT NULL OR endpoint_path IS NOT NULL OR resource_path IS NOT NULL ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10
SELECT facility_zone, ROUND(STDDEV(throughput_rate), 2) AS tput_stddev, ROUND(STDDEV(load_factor), 2) AS load_stddev, COUNT(*) AS n FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY facility_zone ORDER BY facility_zone
SELECT _timestamp, COALESCE(bot_flag, 'NULL_FLAG') AS bot, COALESCE(info_tag, 'NULL_TAG') AS tag FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 15
SELECT bot_flag, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY bot_flag ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate > 700 AND load_factor > 80 AND re_match(facility_zone, 'ZONE-[1-3]') AND response_code IN (200, 201) AND action_category = 'performanceMetric' ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate BETWEEN 200 AND 800 AND _timestamp BETWEEN (SELECT MIN(_timestamp) FROM "{stream}") AND (SELECT MAX(_timestamp) FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate > 500) ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10
SELECT MAX(throughput_rate) AS max_tput, MIN(throughput_rate) AS min_tput FROM "{stream}" WHERE facility_zone = 'ZONE-99'

SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, facility_zone FROM "{stream}" WHERE pallet_id IN (SELECT pallet_id FROM "{stream}" WHERE throughput_rate > 600) AND facility_zone IN ('ZONE-1', 'ZONE-2', 'ZONE-3') ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10
SELECT DISTINCT facility_zone, operation_mode, scan_category FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY facility_zone, operation_mode, scan_category

SELECT _timestamp, org_name, page_slug FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name NOT IN ('warehouse-central', 'warehouse-north', 'warehouse-south') AND page_slug NOT IN ('homePage', 'searchPage') ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10
SELECT _timestamp, log, CHAR_LENGTH(log) AS len, CHAR_LENGTH(TRIM(log)) AS trimmed_len FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 10

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, UPPER(org_name) AS org_upper, LOWER(scan_category) AS scan_lower FROM "{stream}" WHERE re_match(LOWER(org_name), 'warehouse') ORDER BY _timestamp LIMIT 15

SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, load_factor, throughput_rate, CASE WHEN load_factor >= 80.0 AND cell_temp >= 30.0 THEN 'CRITICAL' WHEN load_factor >= 50.0 AND cell_temp >= 25.0 THEN 'WARNING' WHEN load_factor >= 20.0 THEN 'NORMAL' WHEN charge_remaining < 20.0 THEN 'LOW_CHARGE' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END AS status, COALESCE(bot_flag, info_tag) AS security_flag FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, COALESCE(exception_message, log_message, log) AS message, COALESCE(response_code, 0) AS status, latency_ms, COALESCE(scan_category, 'not_scanned') AS scan_type FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY latency_ms DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

queries.sql: SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, sorter_model, facility_zone, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE facility_zone IN ('ZONE-1', 'ZONE-2') AND throughput_rate > 200 AND (operation_mode = 'auto' OR charge_remaining > 40.0) ORDER BY throughput_rate DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, component_name, region_code, latency_ms, response_code, CASE WHEN latency_ms < 100 THEN 'fast' WHEN latency_ms < 500 THEN 'normal' WHEN latency_ms < 2000 THEN 'slow' ELSE 'very_slow' END AS latency_tier FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL ORDER BY latency_ms ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, COALESCE(bot_flag, info_tag, passthrough_flag, 'clean') AS security_tag, CAST(COALESCE(lcp_micros, inp_micros, latency_ms) AS FLOAT) AS perf_value, device_type, page_slug FROM "{stream}" WHERE device_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY perf_value DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT DISTINCT facility_zone, control_center, operation_mode, sorter_model FROM "{stream}" WHERE facility_zone IN ('ZONE-1', 'ZONE-3') ORDER BY facility_zone, control_center LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, throughput_rate, load_factor, cell_temp, throughput_rate / NULLIF(load_factor, 0) AS efficiency_ratio FROM "{stream}" WHERE load_factor > 0 ORDER BY efficiency_ratio DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, component_name, latency_ms, lcp_micros, inp_micros, COALESCE(latency_ms, lcp_micros, inp_micros) AS any_latency FROM "{stream}" WHERE latency_ms IS NOT NULL OR lcp_micros IS NOT NULL ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, org_name, site_name, COALESCE(org_name, site_name, region_code) AS location, latency_ms FROM "{stream}" WHERE org_name IS NOT NULL OR site_name IS NOT NULL ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT _timestamp, facility_zone, throughput_rate, item_count, defect_limit, item_count * defect_limit AS quality_index FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY quality_index DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, conveyor_lane, conveyor_segment, facility_zone, throughput_rate FROM "{stream}" WHERE conveyor_lane IN ('LANE-A', 'LANE-B') AND conveyor_segment <= 3 ORDER BY conveyor_lane, conveyor_segment, _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT _timestamp, pallet_id, runtime_hours, scan_attempts, runtime_hours / NULLIF(scan_attempts, 0) AS hours_per_scan FROM "{stream}" WHERE scan_attempts > 0 ORDER BY hours_per_scan DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT _timestamp, node_ip, source_ip, app_label, datacenter, latency_ms FROM "{stream}" WHERE node_ip IS NOT NULL AND source_ip IS NOT NULL ORDER BY latency_ms ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, component_name, guard_mode, filter_result, auth_result, CASE WHEN guard_mode = 'active' AND filter_result = 'block' THEN 'blocked' WHEN guard_mode = 'active' AND filter_result = 'allow' THEN 'allowed' WHEN guard_mode = 'passive' THEN 'monitored' ELSE 'bypassed' END AS traffic_action FROM "{stream}" ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10

SELECT _timestamp, COALESCE(build_signature, build_version) AS build, os_platform, device_type, render_scope, lcp_micros, cls_score FROM "{stream}" WHERE device_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY _timestamp ASC LIMIT 10
